feed.title: AO3 - Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: When Hope Withers
entry.summary:
Author: Trialbyname

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 18,074Chapters: 12/?Kudos: 34

Summary: “𝘈𝘳𝘵𝘩𝘶𝘳, 𝘨𝘦𝘵 𝘣𝘢𝘤𝘬!” No… he had been in it. “𝘔𝘦𝘳𝘭𝘪𝘯? 𝘞𝘩𝘢𝘵 𝘪𝘴 𝘵𝘩𝘢𝘵?” He had been in it. He was sure of that. “𝘔𝘰𝘳𝘨𝘢𝘯𝘢, 𝘺𝘰𝘶 𝘮𝘶𝘴𝘵 𝘬𝘯𝘰𝘸 𝘵𝘩𝘢𝘵 𝘺𝘰𝘶 𝘤𝘢𝘯𝘯𝘰𝘵 𝘥𝘦𝘧𝘦𝘢𝘵 𝘮𝘦.” And he had not been alone. “𝘐 𝘥𝘰 𝘯𝘰𝘵 𝘯𝘦𝘦𝘥 𝘵𝘰 𝘥𝘦𝘧𝘦𝘢𝘵 𝘺𝘰𝘶, 𝘌𝘮𝘳𝘺𝘴-” His hand flew up to his neck, almost by instinct. But there was nothing there. What… what had happened in that hovel?

entry.title: The Lake at the End of the World
entry.summary:
Author: LonelyWhovian

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 16,248Chapters: 7/20Kudos: 7

Summary: He is the Once and Future King. Take heart, for when Albion's need is greatest: Arthur will return. It is these words that keep Merlin at the shores of Avalon. Even centuries after the lake dried up, millennia after its true name was lost, Merlin stays, waiting for his King to return. *** Glastonbury Tor calls out in the dark, and some seek to answer.In between fighting for his life and trying to uncover what might cause the end of the world, Jon Sims stumbles across a mysterious selection of statements that point not only toward Glastonbury, but to the very heart of Arthurian Myth itself. *** Linked through nightmares and each grappling with the changes in the world around them, Merlin and Jon, with the help of their team, must uncover when Albion's need will be greatest, and what they can do to stop it.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Martin Blackwood/Jonathan "Jon" Sims | The Archivist

entry.title: OF FAKE DESTINY REVERSAL
entry.summary:
Author: OfTintagel

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,405Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 24

Summary: When Morgana gets deceived to think Mordred is Emrys and Merlin is Arthur’s Bane, it gives Merlin opportunities he could only dream of. Or, Merlin pretends to be on Morgana’s side, pratically becomes a spy and they plot against poor Mordred together.

entry.title: the ways of the old, old winds blowin' back round
entry.summary:
Author: habituallywastingtime

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 38,530Chapters: 6/16Kudos: 93

Summary: As a child, Arthur didn’t know why he was kept away from the courtyard. Or why it so often smelt… like that. Until one morning, Sir Kay guided him to the balcony he’d only been allowed on sometimes. Only sometimes, because it looks over the courtyard. His father was waiting for him, holding an arm out to beckon him closer. Arthur rushed in, latching himself onto his father’s side as it was so rarely permitted. There was a crowd below him; he had never seen so many people in one place. There was a pile of wood. He remembers little outside of the way his eyes burned, how he at last understood that smell. He remembers forcing down his supper that night and emptying his stomach in the corridor before he could even reach his room. Now he remembers it all. He can’t feel the bruising stones under his knees, hardly tastes the leftover bile coating his mouth. All he knows is the all-consuming realization that his greatest fear and anguish still holds the throne, even in his heart.  sequel to the pale morning sings of forgotten things

entry.title: Accidentally My Companion
entry.summary:
Author: Nakyrah

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 350,448Chapters: 105/?Kudos: 8,027

Summary: After Arthur disobeyed his father and retrieved the Mortaeus flower for Merlin's cure, Arthur's frantic pleading to save Merlin led to a misunderstanding that actually convinced Uther to take the flower to Gaius.Now all Arthur has to do is explain to Merlin why Uther thinks they are lovers.And while Uther is supportive of the relationship, he requires it kept secret. But in his paranoia, Uther misinterprets every innocent interaction between the two as something far more intimate, to the embarrassment of everyone involved.And then the knights begin showing up...Update 27/04/2024: This is long and in-process. So consider a break between story arcs!Arc 1 - (chapters 1-32, 90k words) What happens when you accidentally tell your father you're gay and in love with Merlin and he ships it hard? You make it true.Arc 2 - (chapters 33-70, 110k words) What happens when your father sends you to court someone you have no interest in? Side quests and Gwaine.Arc 3 - (chapters 71+, in progress) What happens when your father invites every eligible woman to Camelot so you can find your wife like you promised in exchange for saving Merlin? Chaos.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: With you, time and time again
entry.summary:
Author: BookiePookies25

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 36,202Chapters: 8/20Kudos: 204

Summary: As Merlin hefted Arthur’s motionless body, Kilgharrah engulfed him in dragonfire, parting with the infuriatingly cryptic words: ‘Your destiny awaits.’After Arthur died, he found himself drowning in all that Merlin had done for him, courtesy of the Lady of the Lake, who bid him this: ‘You don’t have another chance.’When they opened their eyes, they weren’t where they were.In the courtyard where they first met, they meet once again.Another life, another chance. Can they usher in the promised golden age this time round? How would they navigate a Camelot half-forgotten, burdened by ten extra years of memory? And what is the mysterious force that flung them back in time?OrIn which we attempt to untangle the emotional trauma that was Merlin’s life, the messed up but precious friendship that was Merlin and Arthur, and the character injustice that was Morgana.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Would You Tell Me Why
entry.summary:
Author: Noel803

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 16,320Chapters: 6/6Kudos: 154

Summary: Merlin and Arthur have been together for two years. So, when Arthur finally got up the courage to propose, the last thing he expected was to hear the word no. What he really didn’t expect was that Merlin wouldn’t even explain why he won’t marry him. Obviously, Merlin’s magic wasn’t the only secret he had been keeping from Arthur all these years. But there is little time to solve his relationship woes as a new king who has just ascended to the throne in a neighboring country has demanded immediate audience in Camelot.

entry.title: Blind Loyalty
entry.summary:
Author: Shippeoforever

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,397Chapters: 8/10Kudos: 28

Summary: The laws of Camelot are clear: no animal that does not serve for hunting may cross the castle walls. But when the new King Arthur discovers that his closest advisor has defied the rules for a small, snow-white, blind puppy, the destiny of Albion takes an unexpected turn. Amidst secrets shared with the most loyal knights, Morgana's cunning, and the warmth of a love that defies royal decrees, a new law is about to be written... one dictated by the heart.   Note:** Story created with the help of AI, but all ideas are my own. Tags will be added as the story progresses. I should mention that English isn't my first language, so I apologize if there are any spelling mistakes throughout the fanfic. The chapters will be short, I'm warning you now, but that doesn't make it any less of an important story.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: I'm an idiot
entry.summary:
Author: Chunky_monkey11

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,128Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 29

Summary: Arthur will only ever see Merlin as his stupid little servant and nothing more. That is what Merlin thinks anyways. If Arthur thinks that then maybe he should just accept the fact that its true. He is just an idiot. Nothing more.

entry.title: all that was good
entry.summary:
Author: carrionwoes

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 21,727Chapters: 4/30Kudos: 152

Summary: “She looks great, doesn’t she?” Gwen said, seemingly coming out of smoke and shadow. Merlin agreed wordlessly with a nod. “Some people are just born to be queen,” Gwen continued. “No?” Merlin tried to not sound too grossed out, poor Morgana. Contrary to Merlin, Gwen was actually doing her job, filling up goblets, and handing them out to various nobles. “I hope so. One day.” Though it does not seem to stir her away from partaking in healthy gossip. “Well, I would hate to be her,” Merlin exclaimed. “Who'd want to marry Arthur?” Gwen snorted at that.Or, Merlin is born a girl. Some things change, while others stay the same.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings
